  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    usr.sbin/sa          db.c 
  Log:
  Ensure that the -s flag truncates the accounting data.
  
  This problem has only been reported on the amd64 platform.
  
  PR:             bin/120293
  Tested by:      Callum Gibson
  MFC after:      2 weeks
